case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. CARMEN CUMBA

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $282.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100015379) AS TO DEFENDANT CUMBA, CARMEN
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-03-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
